scripts.build:prod: tsc && vite build --mode production && webflow extension bundle && mkdir -p bundle/prod/${VITE_BUNDLE_RECIPIENT:-internal} && mv bundle.zip bundle/prod/${VITE_BUNDLE_RECIPIENT:-internal}/v$(node -p "require('./package.json').version")_${VITE_BUNDLE_RECIPIENT:-internal}_$(date +'%m-%d_%H-%M-%S').zip
scripts.build:dev: tsc && vite build --mode development && webflow extension bundle && mkdir -p bundle/development/${VITE_BUNDLE_RECIPIENT:-internal} && mv bundle.zip bundle/development/${VITE_BUNDLE_RECIPIENT:-internal}/v$(node -p "require('./package.json').version")_${VITE_BUNDLE_RECIPIENT:-internal}_$(date +'%m-%d_%H-%M-%S').zip
